## What

Brief description of the changes.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Link to issue if applicable.

## How

How was this implemented? Highlight key design decisions.

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`golangci-lint run` / `cargo clippy`)
- [ ] Helm charts validate (`helm lint charts/panoptes`)
- [ ] Tested on Kind cluster (if applicable)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows existing patterns and conventions
- [ ] Copyright headers present on new files
- [ ] Documentation updated (if user-facing change)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in committed files
